[[Kleb Zellock]] owned this '''gyrocopter''', that he mostly used as a transport to sell [[Nergon-14/Legends|Nergon-14]] to the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] illegally.

==History==
Trying to escape from an exploding Nergon mine, Kleb was shot with his own [[Stunner/Legends|Mini-stunner]]. [[Yorpo Mog]], [[Jann Tosh]], [[C-3PO/Legends|Threepio]], [[R2-D2/Legends|Artoo]], [[Mon Julpa|Julpa]] and [[Sollag Den]] loaded Kleb into the cargo hold and threw his [[Keshel]]s overboard to keep them from weighing the copter down. With the reduced weight, the vessel carried them all out of the mine to safety.

{{Veh-stub}}
